summary: Israel struck Hezbollah command centers in Beirut's Dahieh suburb, prompting Iranian regime discussions on a response. A vehicle ramming incident injured an Israeli civilian near Efrat, and a shooting in Kokhav Ya'ir resulted in the capture of a suspect. Iranian‑aligned forces announced readiness for "Operation True Promise 5" while the US navy redirected commercial traffic in the Arabian Sea.
key_points: Israel Air Force struck Hezbollah command centers in Beirut's southern suburbs in response to rocket fire (Source: @manniefabian/58454).
Iranian regime held an emergency Supreme National Security Council meeting and decided on a response to the Dahieh strikes (Source: @shin_persian/6600).
IRGC Khatam headquarters prepared for "Operation True Promise 5" following Israeli attacks on Dahieh (Source: @shin_persian/6594).
USS Michael Murphy enforced a blockade against Iran, redirecting 132 commercial vessels and disabling 6 (Source: @shin_persian/6588).
A vehicle ramming near Efrat intersection injured an Israeli civilian; the Palestinian driver was detained (Source: @idf_telegram/24179).
Shooting in Kokhav Ya'ir area: suspect captured, authorities searching for a second attacker (Source: @manniefabian/58443).
Colonel (res.) Chaim Kalomiti killed; another reservist wounded severely (Source: @New_security8200/201129).

sections.executive_summary: Israel Air Force struck Hezbollah command centers in Beirut's Dahieh suburb, prompting an emergency Iranian security council meeting and a declared IRGC operation. Simultaneously, the US navy redirected commercial traffic in the Arabian Sea as part of a blockade against Iran. Additional incidents include a vehicle ramming near Efrat and a shooting in Kokhav Ya'ir, indicating multiple fronts of tension.

points: An emergency meeting of Iran's Supreme National Security Council concluded half an hour ago, with officials stating a decision was made regarding a response to the Israeli strikes on Dahieh, Lebanon (Source: @shin_persian/6600).
Iranian state TV reported that the IRGC Khatam headquarters is ready to launch "Operation True Promise 5" following the Israeli attacks on Dahieh (Source: @shin_persian/6594).

The US CENTCOM reported that the USS Michael Murphy is enforcing a blockade against Iran in the Arabian Sea, having redirected 132 commercial vessels and disabled 6 as of June 7 (Source: @shin_persian/6588).

Iran condemned US attacks on radar and coastal monitoring facilities in the Sirik region and the island of Qeshm as a clear violation of the ceasefire and a military aggression against Iranian sovereignty (Source: @VahidOnline/75971).

The Israeli Air Force carried out strikes in Beirut's southern suburbs targeting Hezbollah command centers, citing retaliation for Hezbollah rocket fire on northern Israel earlier that morning (Source: @manniefabian/58454).

A vehicle ramming incident at the Efrat junction in the Etzion Brigade area involved a Palestinian driver hitting an Israeli civilian, who sustained light injuries and was taken to hospital; the driver and several suspects were detained (Source: @idf_telegram/24179).
Security forces captured a suspect in the Kokhav Ya'ir shooting; a second possible attacker remains at large (Source: @manniefabian/58443).

The IDF spokesperson announced that, following the Prime Minister and Defense Minister's directive, the army is currently striking terrorist command posts in the Dahieh district of Beirut (Source: @New_security8200/201105).
Colonel (res.) Chaim Kalomiti was killed; another reservist was seriously wounded and taken for medical treatment (Source: @New_security8200/201129).
No explicit Gaza or West Bank operational details were provided in the source messages.
Israeli airstrikes hit the Dahieh suburb of Beirut, targeting Hezbollah command centers as retaliation for rocket fire (Source: @manniefabian/58454).
PressTV reported a fresh round of Israeli airstrikes on the Dahiyeh suburb in south Beirut (Source: @presstv/193017).
Local reports mention large numbers of casualties in southern Beirut following the Israeli aggression (Source: @naya_foriraq/77321).
Video footage showed a large explosion in Dahieh, claimed by the Israeli Prime Minister's office as an attack on Hezbollah headquarters (Source: @SharghDaily/164330).
No explicit Syria or Iraq operational details were provided in the source messages.
No explicit Gulf States operational details were provided in the source messages.

key_developments: Israel Air Force struck Hezbollah command centers in Beirut's Dahieh suburb in response to rocket fire (Source: @manniefabian/58454).
Iran's Supreme National Security Council held an emergency meeting and decided on a response to the Dahieh strikes (Source: @shin_persian/6600).
IRGC Khatam headquarters announced readiness for "Operation True Promise 5" after Israeli attacks (Source: @shin_persian/6594).
USS Michael Murphy enforced a blockade against Iran, redirecting 132 commercial vessels and disabling 6 (Source: @shin_persian/6588).
Vehicle ramming near Efrat injured an Israeli civilian; the Palestinian driver and additional suspects were detained (Source: @idf_telegram/24179).
Shooting in Kokhav Ya'ir area: one suspect captured, search ongoing for a second attacker (Source: @manniefabian/58443).
Colonel (res.) Chaim Kalomiti killed; another reservist wounded severely (Source: @New_security8200/201129).
sections.threat_assessment: The coordinated Israeli strikes on Hezbollah facilities in Beirut and the Iranian regime's rapid convening of its security council indicate a heightened risk of broader regional escalation. Iran's preparation for a named operation and the US naval blockade suggest multiple state actors are positioning for further confrontation. Ground incidents such as vehicle ramming and shootings within Israel reflect persistent low‑level violence that could be leveraged into larger clashes.
sections.regional_response: Lebanese authorities have reported casualties in southern Beirut, while Iranian media signal readiness for retaliatory operations. The United States continues to project power in the Arabian Sea, disrupting Iranian maritime activities. Israeli leadership has authorized continued air operations against perceived terrorist command posts across several fronts.
sections.intelligence_notes: Monitoring of IRGC communications is critical as "Operation True Promise 5" may involve cross‑border actions. The USS Michael Murphy's blockade effects on commercial shipping could be used by Iran to justify escalatory measures. Israeli ground security must tighten checkpoints after the Efrat ramming incident to prevent further civilian targeting. Continued surveillance of Hezbollah's command infrastructure in Dahieh is essential to assess the impact of recent airstrikes.
